activities.title: Distinguishing RNA Genome Types
activities.activity_preamble: This activity builds a foundation by clarifying how different RNA genomes relate to translation and replication.
activities.learner_task: Study the explanation and worked example. Complete the classification table by comparing genome types.
activities.expected_output: A completed comparison table correctly distinguishing RNA genome types with accurate explanations for each column.
activities.reasoning_orientation: Focus on why translation differs between genome types.

activities.title: Explaining RNA Virus Replication and Mutation
activities.activity_preamble: This activity examines how replication mechanisms lead to viral diversity.
activities.learner_task: Review the explanation and worked example.
activities.expected_output: A completed table showing clear causal links between replication mechanisms and viral diversity.

activities.title: Mapping the RNA Virus Replication Cycle
activities.activity_preamble: This activity builds procedural understanding of the replication cycle.
activities.learner_task: Study the worked example, then complete the replication cycle table.
activities.expected_output: A complete and correctly ordered replication cycle with clear explanations for each stage.
activities.reasoning_orientation: Focus on sequence and function alignment.

activities.title: Analysing Hepatitis C Entry Strategy
activities.activity_preamble: This activity develops analytical thinking around multi-step viral entry.
activities.learner_task: Analyse the scenario and complete the table.
activities.expected_output: An analysis showing how multiple receptors improve infection efficiency.
activities.conceptual_contrast_prompt: Compare single vs multi-receptor entry outcomes.

activities.title: Evaluating Viral Regulation and Immune Evasion
activities.activity_preamble: This activity focuses on evaluating key regulatory and evasion strategies.
activities.expected_output: A justified evaluation identifying most effective mechanisms with reasoning.

activities.title: Synthesis: Explaining RNA Virus Strategy
activities.activity_preamble: This final activity consolidates learning and supports integration across concepts.
activities.learner_task: Write a structured explanation of RNA virus replication using Hepatitis C as an example.
activities.expected_output: A coherent written explanation integrating concepts of entry, replication, and immune evasion.
activities.transfer_or_application_task: Apply explanation to another RNA virus scenario.
